chapter_title.en: Chapter 56 – Regarding the one who does not intend the Tamatto

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/200)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/200)
text: مَا طَافَ بَيْنَ هَذَيْنِ الْحَجَرَيْنِ الصَّفَا وَ الْمَرْوَةِ أَحَدٌ إِلَّا أَحَلَّ إِلَّا سَائِقَ الْهَدْيِ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad, from Al Hassan Bin Ali, from Yunus Bin Yaqoub, from the one who informed him,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassanasws having said: ‘Whoever performs Tawaaf (circumambulation) between the two stones, Al-Safa and Al-Marwa, would be out of the state of (from Ihraam), unless he is ushering the sacrificial animal’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ahmad has narrated from al-Hassan ibn Ali from Yunus ibn Ya’qub from those who narrated to him who has said the following: “Abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Whoever performs Tawaf between these two stones, al- Safa’ and al-Marwah, is out of the state of Ihram unless he has driven the offering animal along with him.’”
